articles.title: Trump lashes out at 'paper tiger' NATO while re-upping Greenland claim
articles.content: Trump's remarks came ahead of a visit by the defence alliance's chief Mark Rutte scheduled for later this week. "Look, we went to NATO," Trump recalled. "I didn't ask very strongly, I just said, 'Hey, if you want to help, great.'"
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스
📢 Trump lashes out at 'paper tiger' NATO while re-up...
